
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Dawn's Cranberry Chutney.
    Summary: Nathan,

This recipe comes to you from my biological mother’s kitchen. Your Aunt Emily loves this recipe and requests it every year for Thanksgiving. She makes it better than I ever could. Just remember that I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 0.33 cup orange juice, 1.5 cups sugar, 12 oz fresh cranberries, 1 cup raisins/currants, 1  apple, 1  orange, 0.5 cup pecans, 1 tablespoon apple cider vinegar, 0.25 teaspoon cinnamon, 0.25 teaspoon allspice, 0.25 teaspoon ground ginger, 0.25 teaspoon ground clove
    Tags: cranberry, sweet, Christmas, sauce
    The image should be high quality and suitable for a recipe website.
    Do not include any letters or text in the image.
    Make sure the picture includes a garden gnome in it.
